sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22941" key="guido/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γυι-δόνητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n22941.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with bruised limbs,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0303.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Trag.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
